subcodes.first_line: In this day, from the rustling of the breezes wafting from the gardens of utterance, this word is heard: "O people of Bahá, fix not your gaze..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز از هزیز اریاح ریاض بیان این کلمه استماع میشود یا اهل البهاء لاتنظروا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @exhortations and counsels, @goodly deeds; actions, @praise and encouragement
